text: I feel curiously suspended between the practical and the philosophical. The energy of conversation swells around me—people negotiating futures, opportunities, and the flow of knowledge. Then, shifting to the R+D display, I’m steeped in nostalgia and wonder: relics of past ingenuity reminding me of the slow, purposeful hand of innovation. Here I become both participant in the present and witness to the evolution of connection. A sense of smallness rises within me, yet I am comforted by the thought that meaning is found together, in shared questions, ambitions, and discoveries.
